name: @pratibimba/acceptance-harness
description: Track 05 T9 — Full Theia-shell acceptance harness and release gate. Builds (a) a repeatable Node-driven acceptance script that boots real services (gateway, SpaceTimeDB, Neo4j/Redis, S5 stores), launches the Theia shell, exercises the kernel-bridge + OmniPanel + ide-shell-m0-m5 + agentic-control-room surfaces, and shuts down cleanly; (b) a Theia-side acceptance contribution that the headless run drives; (c) the operator runbook; (d) ADR-05-011 release ADR.
